comment: GENERATED by gen_fpga_blank.py from device_profiles/fpga-main.yaml — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. An FPGA BLANK: the internally-connected fabric reference (register-file geometry, clock-domain table, I/O + resource budget from the real part). NO module allocation, NO logic, NO addresses — modules are installed by the install tool (phase 4) after system-wide addressing (phase 3). The fabric register file IS the interconnect.
